articles.title: TRIAGE: Role-Typed Credit Assignment for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

articles.summary: TRIAGE提出角色类型化信用分配方法，用于智能体强化学习。将动作分为搜索、点击、编辑等角色类型，通过类型级优势函数解决GRPO对探索和冗余动作的误惩问题。在WebAgent和机器人任务上，提升学习效率和最终性能。

articles.excerpt: Unstructured navigational features, such as irregular planting or discontinuities, remain the primary failure mode for under-canopy agricultural robots. articles.summary: LeCropFollow提出潜空间规划方法，用于非结构化农田中冠下导航。利用变分自编码器将视觉观测映射到概率潜空间，保留不确定性语义，通过规划器选择可行路径。在真实农业机器人上，相比几何方法减少50%的导航失败率。

articles.title: MemLearner: Learning to Query Context memory for Video World Models
articles.excerpt: Video World Models are interactive video generation models that predict future world states based on user actions and history video frames. A critical challenge in video world models is the lack of memory, causing inconsistent generated scenes over extended durations. Previous methods explored rule-based context frame retrieval as memory, but they fail to generalize in scenarios with scene occlusi
articles.summary: MemLearner学习查询上下文记忆以增强视频世界模型的长时一致性。提出可学习检索模块，从历史帧中动态选择相关上下文，替代规则式帧选择。在交互视频生成中，有效应对场景遮挡和视角变化，生成更连贯的未来帧序列。

articles.title: Xiaomi-GUI-0 Technical Report
articles.excerpt: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents build on vision-language models to complete user tasks end-to-end in real applications through interface actions such as tapping, swiping, text entry, and navigation. However, existing GUI agents are trained and evaluated largely on offline trajectories, simulated environments, and standardized benchmarks. These differ substantially from real applications in i
articles.summary: 小米GUI-0是一个面向真实应用的GUI智能体技术报告。构建了基于视觉语言模型的智能体，在真实手机上完成点击、滑动、输入等操作。相比离线基准测试，在动态界面和任务多样性的真实场景中表现更实际，展示了端到端部署潜力。

articles.title: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent
articles.excerpt: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions,
articles.summary: Agents-A1是一个35B参数MoE智能体模型，通过扩展智能体视界（长轨迹与异构能力）达到万亿参数级性能。构建了长视界知识-行动基础设施，连接外部知识与行动执行。在复杂任务上，以更少参数实现与超大模型相当的推理和规划能力。

articles.title: SWE-INTERACT: Reimagining SWE Benchmarks as User-Driven Long-Horizon Coding Sessions
articles.excerpt: We introduce SWE-Interact, a new testbed for evaluating coding agents on multi-turn, interactive, user-driven software engineering tasks. Existing frontier SWE benchmarks typically provide complete requirements upfront and evaluate agents on autonomous implementation. In contrast, SWE-Interact places agents in a realistic developer workflow: a carefully designed user simulator starts with vague or
articles.summary: SWE-Interact是一个多轮交互式软件工程任务测试床。通过用户模拟器从模糊需求逐步细化，评估编码智能体在真实开发者工作流中的表现。相比一次性基准，更贴近实际协作开发，揭示了智能体在需求澄清和迭代修改方面的不足。

articles.title: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
articles.excerpt: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the
articles.summary: MOPD提出多教师在线蒸馏范式，用于LLM后训练中的能力整合。通过在线交互中蒸馏多个专家模型（教师）的知识到学生模型，解决离线微调与混合强化学习效率低、性能损失的问题。在数学推理、代码生成等任务上实现多能力融合。

articles.title: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview: A Low-Compute Real-Time Controllable World Model
articles.excerpt: We present DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview, a preview foundational world model for real-time interactive world simulation. The system adapts the LongLive 1 autoregressive video stack, itself derived from Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, with a residual action pathway inspired by the Matrix-Game family. DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview focuses on a complementary axis to frontier-scale world simulators: low-compute adapta
articles.summary: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview是一个低计算量实时可控世界模型。基于LongLive自回归视频栈和Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B，引入残差动作路径。专注于在有限资源下实现交互式世界模拟，支持实时用户控制，为游戏、机器人仿真等场景提供轻量级方案。

articles.title: TACO: Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization for Agentic Tool Use
articles.excerpt: Agentic multimodal models perform diverse operations on an image via code and reason over the returned view, an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual question answering. However, code operations can be useful, redundant, or misleading. Outcome-only rewards cannot precisely distinguish these cases, and existing process rewards either fail to attribute final correctness to individual tool calls
articles.summary: TACO提出工具增强信用优化方法，用于智能体工具使用。针对多模态智能体通过代码操作图像时，不同工具调用贡献不明确的问题，设计基于过程奖励的信用分配机制，精确区分有用、冗余或误导性调用。提升细粒度VQA任务的工具使用准确率。
